subject: [PATCH v2 2/2] x86/tdx: Fix zero-extension for 32-bit port I/O

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the x86/tdx code where 32-bit port I/O operations were not properly zero-extending their results to 64 bits. The fix updates the handle_in function to clear the entire RAX register when the I/O size is 4 bytes, ensuring that the result is correctly extended. This patch addresses a problem introduced by an earlier commit and has been reviewed by multiple developers.
